metadata.description: AI-SDLC — an expert-driven software delivery pipeline for Claude Code, with an end-to-end test-driven "dark factory" track

plugins.name: ai-sdlc
plugins.description: AI-driven software delivery lifecycle. Core pipeline: discuss → req2prd → prd2plan → (plan2jira | plan2linear) → execute-plan. Plus a test-driven e2e pipeline (a "dark factory") — tests authored before code from a mock app or Figma design, buildable lights-out. 23 builder agents, 20 critics, a Devil's Advocate gate.
